chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1140 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4613/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Petitioner Habibullah Solangi present in person Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for Respondent No.2&3 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Muhammad Suleman Dahri, Assistant Manager (Legal) SEPCO >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for Syed Zafar Ali Shah, learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is not opposed by learned counsel for Respondents No.2 and 3 as well as learned DAG. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
